system.duration: One night's dream, or 10 minutes of real time
system.effect: Casting Time: This spell requires 2d6 turns to cast. This functions similarly to Dream Communication, except that it works entirely on a subconscious level. The caster provides a one sentence suggestion that they infuse into a nightmare. The target of the suggestion will suffer horrible nightmares that embed the suggestion on a deeper level than the target is aware of. Upon waking, the target will have a strange compulsion to perform the task that is probably quite outside of their normal behavior. They must roll INT/10+ to avoid the compulsion, but each time they do so, they suffer a -1 modifier penalty to all other actions not pertaining to the carrying out of the suggestion.
system.critSuccess: The suggestion is so strong that the roll to avoid the compulsion is INT/12+.
